packageRules.description: goproxy v1.8.5 regressed the MITM path: the client connection is wrapped in a bufio.Writer that is only flushed after resp.Write returns, so response headers and small SSE events stay buffered until the whole body is consumed. Keep v1.8.4 until a fixed release ships.

The allowedVersions cap above must never suppress a security fix. goproxy carries all sandboxed MITM traffic, so a CVE there has to surface even while the cap is in place; the resulting PR needs a manual check that the v1.8.5 buffering regression is gone before merge.
